## Collections.IResultMap interface

Interface for a mutable [ResultMap](./ts-utils.collections.resultmap.md)<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface IResultMap<TK extends string = string, TV = unknown> extends IReadOnlyResultMap<TK, TV> 
```
